evidence.snippet: ##### Decavo specializes in state-of-the-art composite engineering and manufacturing. We're here to meet your business needs, from initial concept to full production.

Our integrated design, engineering and manufacturing expertise allows us to offer price-competitive composite solutions for a wide range of industries. Whether using carbon fiber, fiberglass or aramid materials, we create state of the art components that combine functionality, price and style. And we do it with our signature responsiveness and superior customer service.

items.notes: Decavo specializes in carbon fiber, fiberglass and aramid composite engineering and manufacturing for aerospace, medical, industrial, and specialty markets.
Makes camera housings and EMI enclosures as composite product lines for aerospace customers.

products_categories.notes: The /aerospace, /composite-assemblies, /camera-housings, /emi-enclosures pages were skipped; those would refine sub-category coverage.

evidence.snippet: ##### Decavo specializes in state-of-the-art composite engineering and manufacturing. We're here to meet your business needs, from initial concept to full production.
##### With our rapid response and turn-key solutions, we help you bring your product to market quickly. As demand for your product grows, we have the capacity to support your production needs.﻿
The goal of our quality management system is to consistently exceed all customer and industry requirements. We are AS9100 and ISO 9001 certified.

readiness.notes: Site states 'from initial concept to full production', 'capacity to support your production needs', and holds AS9100 and ISO 9001 certifications, all indicating active serial production.
